name: Thunderbolt Indoor Golf & Games
about: Thunderbolt Indoor Golf & Games is an indoor golf facility offering a range of services including simulator play, lessons, leagues, and event hosting. The venue utilizes technology-powered golf lessons and features a loyalty program that rewards members with 5% cash back on purchases. It also offers memberships for exclusive benefits and provides options for parties, corporate events, and group bookings. The facility appears to focus on creating a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels, with a strong emphasis on community engagement through leagues and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-powered lessons to improve your golf game
Loyalty program with 5% cash back rewards
Variety of leagues and events for social play
Option to host parties and corporate events

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with multiple payment options accepted

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue likely provides club rentals, but it's recommended to bring your own for familiarity if possible. Contact them directly for specific details on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar, so bringing outside food and drinks may not be permitted. However, they offer food and beverage services for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes on a simulator takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play. The venue may offer packages or time slots for different session lengths.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Thunderbolt Indoor Golf & Games is kid-friendly, offering a fun atmosphere suitable for families and younger players. They have events and party options that cater to all ages.
